evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: 通过约束获得自由 (freedom through constraints)
entities.how_described: 本集的一条底层人生与商业哲学。指当你面对不可抗拒的约束(如公司资源匮乏或个人重创)时,这反而能释放过剩选择,逼迫你保持极度专注与自律。

evidence.quote: I think there's this broader principle I have just around life of like, the freedom through constraints, that when you have a bunch of constraints applied on you, whether that's in personal life or at work, I think that it can bring a lot of freedom because it just frees up all this excess choice.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: I think that freedom through constraints is one of the big takeaways I've had during that time.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: 指数级 (exponential)
entities.how_described: 本集反复提及的核心思维模式。嘉宾认为由于模型能力呈指数级增长,公司两年后交付的产品价值是今天的 100 到 1000 倍,这要求他们下大赌注而非微优化。

evidence.quote: We always talk about the exponential.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And I think it ultimately comes down to our fixation of this company about the exponential.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: I think if you look at anyone who's talking from Anthropic about basically anything, we always talk about the exponential.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: It's effectively as model capabilities continue to grow on an exponential and the tools around them enable a better job of diffusing that into useful use cases, you basically just keep unlocking new markets where the value of those markets significantly dwarfs what the value of the previous markets were.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: It's not exponential though.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: But for Anthropic, it's not really that way, where because of the exponential and our products being very, very, very ... The product value coming from AI, the product value that we will deliver in two years' time is probably a 1,000x, a 100 to a 1,000x what it is today.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: So I don't know, companies like Lovable, Cursor, all these great businesses that are, as the exponential rises, their value props are also going to continue to rise significantly.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Although, I think you look at the exponential, this wasn't available at all a couple of months ago.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: First is I go back to something I said earlier, which is that we very much think about things from an exponential lens.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: I think if you're looking at it from an exponential lens and you understand how exponentials work, then you just realize that a lot of this stuff is actually going to be happening sooner than people think if you're looking at it from a linear lens.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: PRD
entities.how_described: 产品需求文档。嘉宾极度反感繁文缛节,表示团队交付的 60% 到 80% 的产品都不写 PRD,改用 Slack 沟通或直接上原型,认为「PRD 已经过时了」。

evidence.quote: This is now the PRD, is look at it instead of talking about it.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: And so probably 70%, maybe 60, 70, 80% of what we ship does not have a PRD.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: What's your approach to crafting that PRD in those cases?
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: Even in those cases, there are times I don't craft a PRD because everything's moving so quickly, right?
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: But if I am creating a PRD, I have basically, a skill that they've created, and then there's projects with all the previous PRDs in there, and then it's pretty simple.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: 软指导 (soft coaching)
entities.how_described: 本集提出的前沿 AI 用法。指利用 Cowork 结合 Slack MCP 查看跨部门工作与沟通记录,每周扫描出潜在目标错位,甚至模拟经理人的偏好来对自己进行每周辅导。

evidence.quote: And so all of this layer of stuff, which is like, I think about it as soft coaching, I think that that is unlocked, in my opinion already.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: CASH
entities.how_described: Claude Accelerates Sustainable Hypergrowth 的缩写,Anthropic 内部尝试自动化增长实验的系统。被描述为像印钞机,其提出想法的胜率相当于有两三年经验的初级 PM。

evidence.quote: We didn't have the free cash flow or the distribution of a Meta or Google.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: Our growth platform team is driving this effort called CASH, which is Claude accelerate sustainable hypergrowth.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: And it's called CASH, which is Claude Accelerates Sustainable Hypergrowth.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: You talked about this cash automation for growing, like, how do I grow this product?
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: We didn't have the free cash flow or the distribution of a Meta or Google.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: 智能体 (agent)
entities.how_described: 本集描述未来跨职能利益相关者协调也可被解决,直到「其他利益相关者有他们自己的小智能体到处跑」,点明了由 AI 驱动的自动化生产力将重塑组织协作。

evidence.quote: The amount of time I've spent on the difference between a registered agent address and a legal address and a physical address, these things are very, very complex.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: This touches on an idea I've always had that Teams will have is a strategy bot, which just imagine an agent that's just constantly watching metrics, the market, the roadmap, what's working, what's not.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

entities.name: AI 安全 (AI safety)
entities.how_described: 被强调为 Anthropic 存在的全部原因与底层护城河。嘉宾坚信,为了 AI 安全牺牲短期指标、把一部分钱留在桌上,将成为公司长远的核心竞争优势。

evidence.quote: So famously, Anthropic, I think the official name of Anthropic is Anthropic, an AI safety research company.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: Our goal is AI safety and alignment.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_0

evidence.quote: I think for us, AI safety is very much in one.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: MCP
entities.how_described: 本集提到通过在 Cowork 桌面应用中连接 Slack MCP,可以让 Claude 纵观内部沟通记录并找出公司内潜在的不一致领域。

evidence.quote: So with Cowork, you have the Slack MCP, and you can tell Cowork to say basically, "Look across Slack.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: It uses the Chrome extension for some things and it uses MCP for other things, and then it'll just give me a summary, and then I know... I saw this one, a few charts that I just like to look at because I was just like, "I'm a numbers guy.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: You can say, using the Slack MCP, "Look at everything that this person has said in the last week, et cetera."
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: You go on to Cowork, download the desktop app on Cowork, connect the Slack MCP.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

evidence.quote: But once you have the Slack MCP connected and on [inaudible 01:06:25], you just ask Claude.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1
